3259530.name: Holomancer
3259530.description:
As a Holomancer, you are more than a survivor, you are a world-builder, a spell-smith, and a guardian of the last unbroken threads of reality.

  • Infinite Worlds, Infinite Stories
    Traverse a procedurally generated planet that grows with each playthrough. From crystalline deserts to haunted forests, every biome offers new challenges, resources, and secrets to uncover.

  • Craft. Build. Reshape.
    Harness magic and technology alike. Forge weapons, construct strongholds, and design your avatar with gear that reflects your path, warrior, mage, inventor, or something entirely your own.

  • Survive the Corruption
    Face relentless enemies born of a spreading corruption. Engage them with ranged firepower, devastating spells, or summoned constructs. Combat is fast, tactical, and ever-shifting.

  • Living Lore
    Villages rise, quests unfold, and stories intertwine as you explore. The choices you make shape not just your character, but the world itself.
3259530.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
